selected_feat.title: Runner 用户入口流
selected_feat.goal: 冻结一个用户可显式调用的 Execution Loop Job Runner 入口 skill，让 operator 能从 Claude/Codex CLI 启动或恢复自动推进。
scope: 定义独立 skill 入口：Execution Loop Job Runner。
定义入口 skill 的最小输入、启动时机和与 ready queue 的绑定边界。
定义 operator 通过入口 skill 触发 runner 的责任，而不是继续依赖人工接力或隐式后台。
constraints: Execution Loop Job Runner 必须以独立 skill 入口暴露给 Claude/Codex CLI 用户。
入口必须显式声明 start / resume 语义，而不是隐式依赖后台自动进程。
入口不得把 approve 后链路退化成手工逐个调用下游 skill。
入口调用必须保留 authoritative run context 与 lineage。

acceptance_checks.scenario: Runner exposes a named skill entry
acceptance_checks.given: an operator needs to start the execution loop
acceptance_checks.then: the product flow must expose a named runner skill entry instead of hiding start-up inside abstract background automation.

acceptance_checks.when: the runner is started or resumed
acceptance_checks.then: the entry must stay invokable by Claude/Codex CLI rather than requiring direct file edits or out-of-band orchestration.

acceptance_checks.given: EPIC-SRC-003-001 requires an operator-visible way to start automatic progression
acceptance_checks.when: FEAT-SRC-003-002 is reviewed as a standalone capability
acceptance_checks.then: The FEAT must define one dedicated runner skill entry for Claude/Codex CLI instead of relying on implicit background behavior or manual downstream relays.

architecture.reason: runner 用户入口流属于 execution runner 主架构的操作入口扩展。

api.reason: runner 用户入口需要沿用并扩展 execution runner 调用契约。

ui.reason: 需要新增 runner 操作入口可视壳层，供后续控制面和监控面复用。
create_signals: new independent UI shell or panel family

prototype.reason: 需要定义 runner 用户入口主流程原型，作为 UI 壳层的体验骨架。

tech.reason: 已有 TECH-SRC-003-002 需按 ADR042 继续承接 runner 用户入口实现策略。
